name: Sola 24" Resin Table Lamp - TBL4609 - Black/Camel - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Sola Table Lamp, a stunning blend of modern style and timeless design. This lamp features a bold black and camel contrast that adds intriguing depth to any room. Crafted with a refined resin body and topped with a smooth paper shade, the Sola Table Lamp effortlessly enhances any decor scheme. Its soft lighting creates a cozy atmosphere, perfect for reading or unwinding. Transform your living area or bedroom with this captivating piece that exudes warmth and grace.
